name: EZ Battery Reconditioning
summary: A step-by-step course that teaches how to recondition old, worn-out batteries (car, phone, laptop) back to near-full working capacity instead of throwing them out.
best_for: Budget-conscious DIYers who want to extend battery life and cut down on replacement costs.
keywords: how to recondition a car battery

name: The Grid Phantom: AI Defence System
summary: A preparedness guide covering low-tech ways to protect a household's privacy, security, and essential systems from AI-driven surveillance and automation risks.
best_for: Preparedness-minded readers concerned about privacy, surveillance, and tech-driven security risks.

name: The Masuda Prayer
summary: A spiritual audio program built around a traditional-style prayer ritual intended to help listeners focus their mindset toward abundance and positive change.
best_for: Readers interested in faith-based or ritual-based manifestation and daily spiritual practice.
